top_signals.title: Everybody Wants Fed Independence, Rubenstein Says
top_signals.summary: Carlyle Co-Founder and Co-Chairman David Rubenstein discusses his outlook for interest rates and his expectations of the Federal Reserve under Chair Kevin Warsh. He also shares his views on investing with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BP chair’s departure turns spotlight on Meg O’Neill to deliver swift turnaround
top_signals.summary: Albert Manifold’s behaviour and use of personal devices cited as factors in his removal over conduct and governance concerns
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kinross bets $3B on Chile gold district growth
top_signals.summary: Kinross advances one of Chile’s biggest proposed gold mines as Atacama cements its global mining hub role.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: First Phosphate update expands EV battery ingredient fourfold in Quebec
top_signals.summary: The update outlines 6.2 million measured pit-constrained tonnes grading 7.7% phosphate and 198.5 million indicated tonnes at 6%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Steel giant ArcelorMittal fined $72M for polluting rivers in Quebec
top_signals.summary: The conviction relates to various deposits of deleterious substances that took place between May 2014 and May 2022.

top_signals.title: Vizsla secures $10M in Mexico-backed loan for Panuco project
top_signals.summary: Vizsla CEO calls the facility "another important step" in the continued endorsement of its flagship project in the state of Sinaloa.

top_signals.title: US, India establish framework for critical minerals partnership
top_signals.summary: The bilateral agreement follows India's February inclusion into Pax Silica.
